content.query:
--DROP EXTERNAL TABLE M3.ODHEAD
--DROP VIEW M3.ODHEAD
CREATE VIEW M3.ODHEAD AS
SELECT * FROM M3.ODHEAD_PRE
UNION ALL 
SELECT * FROM M3.ODHEAD_ARCx

--DROP VIEW ODHEAD_ARC
CREATE VIEW M3.ODHEAD_ARC AS 
SELECT
	CONVERT(bigint,[CONO]) [CONO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DIVI]) [DIVI],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ORNO]) [ORNO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DLIX]) [DLIX],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[FACI]) [FACI],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[WHLO]) [WHLO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ORTP]) [ORTP],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUNO]) [CUNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PYNO]) [PYNO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[OPRI]) [OPRI],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PLRI]) [PLRI],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DNNO]) [DNNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ORST]) [ORST],
	CONVERT(date,[DLDT]) [DLDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DLTM]) [DLTM],
	CONVERT(bigint,[IVNO]) [IVNO],
	CONVERT(bigint,[YEA4]) [YEA4],
	CONVERT(bigint,[IVDT]) [IVDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[INTM]) [INTM],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUCD]) [CUCD],
	CONVERT(float,[RAIN]) [RAIN],
	CONVERT(bigint,[ACDT]) [ACDT],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[TEPY]) [TEPY],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[FECN]) [FECN],
	CONVERT(float,[BRAM]) [BRAM],
	CONVERT(float,[NTAM]) [NTAM],
	CONVERT(float,[GRWE]) [GRWE],
	CONVERT(float,[NEWE]) [NEWE],
	CONVERT(float,[VOL3]) [VOL3],
	CONVERT(bigint,[AICD]) [AICD],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[MODL]) [MODL],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[TEDL]) [TEDL],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ADID]) [ADID],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CONN]) [CONN],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[IVGP]) [IVGP],
	CONVERT(bigint,[UPST]) [UPST],
	CONVERT(bigint,[UPIS]) [UPIS],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[INRC]) [INRC],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[APBY]) [APBY],
	CONVERT(bigint,[APDT]) [APDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[TXID]) [TXID],
	CONVERT(bigint,[PRTX]) [PRTX],
	CONVERT(bigint,[POTX]) [POTX],
	CONVERT(bigint,[DTID]) [DTID],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ROUT]) [ROUT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RODN]) [RODN],
	CONVERT(bigint,[ORS1]) [ORS1],
	CONVERT(bigint,[ORS2]) [ORS2],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PROJ]) [PROJ],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[ELNO]) [ELNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[PRST]) [PRST],
	CONVERT(date,[RGDT]) [RGDT],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[NREF]) [NREF],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RGTM]) [RGTM],
	CONVERT(date,[LMDT]) [LMDT],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CHNO]) [CHNO],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CHID]) [CHID],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RYEA]) [RYEA],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RIVN]) [RIVN],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RDLX]) [RDLX],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DBCR]) [DBCR],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CIME]) [CIME],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[INPX]) [INPX],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[EXIN]) [EXIN],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[RINP]) [RINP],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[RXIN]) [RXIN],
	TRY_CONVERT(datetime2(7),[LMTS]) [LMTS],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CUCH]) [CUCH],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[CCAC]) [CCAC],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[DECU]) [DECU],
	CONVERT(bigint,[VRGD]) [VRGD],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[RLBY]) [RLBY],
	CONVERT(bigint,[RELD]) [RELD],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CDNU]) [CDNU],
	CONVERT(bigint,[CDDE]) [CDDE],
	CONVERT(bigint,[ADLX]) [ADLX],
	CONVERT(bigint,[ORS3]) [ORS3],
	CONVERT(nvarchar(4000),[RSCD]) [RSCD],
	CONVERT(bigint,[GRN0]) [GRN0],
	CONVERT(bigint,[MTXD]) [MTXD]
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3P/ODHEAD_ARC.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
